title: iron's spellbooks arcane essence blocks
description: this mod is an add-on to ISS, adding 3 new block made out of arcane essence to help stacking items in your inventory
body:
This Mod Requires Iron's Spells And SpellBooks

Tired of having a bazillion stack of arcane essence? Introducing: The Essence Sack, Arcane Essence Block and Arcan Ingot Block:

![Arcane Ingot Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66eee72646581ee670c687a252669ed9492a64bf.png)

![Arcane Essence Sack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9803bd6269c8b495a1e69adf7271af45680989ff.png)

![Arcane Essence Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b94e877122523932c9a4a6cecf784ebac4fe1864.png)


 

CRAFTS:

Arcane Essence Sack can be Crafted with 9 Arcane Essence, and can be uncrafted into 9 Arcane Essence.

Arcane Essence Block can be crafted by  smelting 1 Arcane Essence Sack and can be uncrafted into 9 Arcane Essence

Arcane Ingot Block can be Crafted with 9 Arcane Ingots and uncrafted into 9 Arcane Ingots
